[2m[37m◐[0m [2;3m[37mThe user wants me to:[0m
  [2;3m[37m1. Analyze the project code[0m
  [2;3m[37m2. Find improvement points[0m

  [2;3m[37m6. Fix violations[0m

  [2;3m[37mLet me start by thoroughly exploring the codebase to understand it, then identify issues.[0m

  [2;3m[37mLet me start with a broad exploration of the r8_go codebase.[0m

[1m[32m●[39m Get all build errors[0m
  [37m$ cd /workspace/tmp/r8_go && go build ./... 2>&1[39m
  [37m└ 5 lines...[39m

[1m[32m●[39m List all Go source files[0m
  [37m$ cd /workspace/tmp/r8_go && find . -name "*.go" | grep -v "_test.go" | grep -v vendor | sort | head -80[39m
  [37m└ 81 lines...[39m

[1m[32m●[39m Count Go files[0m
  [37m$ cd /workspace/tmp/r8_go && find . -name "*.go" | grep -v "_test.go" | grep -v vendor | wc -l && echo "---" && find . -name "*.go" | grep -v vendor | wc -l[39m
  [37m└ 4 lines...[39m

[1m[32m●[39m Check application_writer.go with build error[0m
  [37m$ cd /workspace/tmp/r8_go && cat src/graph/application_writer.go | head -120[39m
  [37m└ 121 lines...[39m

[1m[32m●[39m Check native_pipeline.go build errors area
[0m  [37m$ cd /workspace/tmp/r8_go && cat cmd/native_pipeline.go | sed -n '190,250p'[39m
  [37m└ 62 lines...[39m

[2m[37m◐[0m [2;3m[37mNow I can see the build errors clearly. In `native_pipeline.go`:[0m
  [2;3m[37m1. Line 211: `newNativePipelineApplicationWriter(tool, appView)` - `appView` is of type `graph.AppView` (interface), but the function signature expects `*graph.AppView`.[0m
  [2;3m[37m2. Line 232: `graph.NewApplicationWriter(appView, nil)` - `appView` is `*graph.AppView`, but the function expects `graph.AppView`.[0m
  [2;3m[37m3. Line 233: `writerintegration.AttachKnownDesugarersToApplicationWriter(writer, tool, appView)` - same issue.[0m


  [2;3m[37mThe root issue is that `newNativePipelineApplicationWriter` is defined to take a pointer to the interface `*graph.AppView`, but in Go you should never use pointers to [0m
  [2;3m[37minterfaces. I need to change the function signature to accept `graph.AppView` directly instead.[0m

[1m[32m●[39m Check context around build errors in native_pipeline.go[0m
  [37m$ cd /workspace/tmp/r8_go && cat cmd/native_pipeline.go | sed -n '200,245p'[39m
  [37m└ 47 lines...[39m

[1m[32m●[39m List all packages with build failures[0m
  [37m$ cd /workspace/tmp/r8_go && go test ./... 2>&1 | grep "build failed" | sed 's/FAIL\t//' | sed 's/ \[build failed\]//'[39m
  [37m└ 3 lines...[39m

[2m[37m◐[0m [2;3m[37mNow I can see the issue clearly. Let me check what `graph.NewAppViewWithOptions` returns.[0m

[1m[32m●[39m Check AppView type and constructor[0m
  [37m$ cd /workspace/tmp/r8_go && grep -n "NewAppViewWithOptions\|AppView\b" src/graph/app_view.go | head -30[39m
  [37m└ 15 lines...[39m

[1m[32m●[39m Find AttachKnownDesugarers signature[0m
  [37m$ cd /workspace/tmp/r8_go && grep -rn "AttachKnownDesugarersToApplicationWriter" --include="*.go" | grep -v "_test.go"[39m
  [37m└ 3 lines...[39m

[1m[32m●[39m Check AttachKnownDesugarers signature[0m
  [37m$ cd /workspace/tmp/r8_go && sed -n '80,100p' src/desugar/writerintegration/application_writer.go[39m
  [37m└ 22 lines...[39m

[2m[37m◐[0m [2;3m[37mNow I understand the issue clearly. [0m

  [2;3m[37m`graph.NewAppViewWithOptions` returns `graph.AppView` (an interface). But `newNativePipelineApplicationWriter` has the signature:[0m
  [2;3m[37m```go[0m
  [2;3m[37mfunc newNativePipelineApplicationWriter(tool string, appView *graph.AppView) *graph.ApplicationWriter {[0m
  [2;3m[37m```[0m

  [2;3m[37mThis is a bug - it's taking a pointer to an interface (`*graph.AppView`), which is never correct in Go. The fix is simple: change `*graph.AppView` to `graph.AppView`.[0m

  [2;3m[37mNow let me do a full analysis of the codebase for architectural issues. Let me look at more code to understand the patterns and problems.[0m


  [2;3m[37mI've identified the build error where `*graph.AppView` should be `graph.AppView` in `native_pipeline.go:232`, and I've already fixed the `Options()` method call in [0m
  [2;3m[37m`application_writer.go`. Now I'm scanning the broader codebase to spot architectural violations around separation of concerns and interface design patterns.[0m

[35m●[39m [97m이제 전체 구조를 파악합니다.[39m

[1m[32m●[39m List remaining Go source files[0m
  [37m$ cd /workspace/tmp/r8_go && find . -name "*.go" | grep -v "_test.go" | grep -v vendor | sort | tail -200 | head -120[39m
  [37m└ 121 lines...[39m

    [37m└ 206 lines read[39m

  [37m부분을 보강하면서 계속 진행하자.[39m

  [37m진행률을 점검하고 미진한 부분, 누락된 작업, 남은 리스크를 리스트업한 뒤 우선순위 높은 것부터 진행해보자.[39m

  [37ms/w architect 관점에서 현재 구조를 분석하고 결합도, 책임 분리, 확장성, 테스트 용이성 측면 개선 포인트를 찾아 적용하자.[39m
  [37m이미 끝난 것과 아직 불완전한 것을 구분하고, 검증이 약한 부분을 보강하면서 계속 진행하자.[39m
  [37m이미 끝난 것과 아직 불완전한 것을 구분하고, 검증이 약한 부분을 보강하면서 계속 진행하자.[39m
